headline: Top 3 Industrials Stocks That May Rocket Higher In June
summary: Opportunity to buy oversold stocks in industrials sector: RSI is a momentum indicator that can predict short-term performance. Genpact, Rollins Inc, and Diana Shipping are oversold with RSI below 30.
